name: Senescence-targeted intervention shows replicated functional benefit in humans
summary: A hallmark-specific milestone for moving beyond biomarker-only evidence.
completion_criteria: At least two independent human studies show benefit on prespecified functional endpoints.
Results are accompanied by an acceptable safety profile.
Benefit is not limited to a single exploratory biomarker.
notes: Milestones are tracker-level judgments and should be updated conservatively.
